title: Dulcet Spiced Jamaican Sweet Potato Grill
description: A savory-sweet grilled sweet potato dish infused with Jamaican spices, tangy vegan white wine vinegar, and a hint of tropical chill, perfect for a romantic date night.
instructions: Preheat a yakimono grill or charcoal grill to medium-high heat, about 200°C, and oil the grates.
Wash sweet potatoes, pat dry, and cut them into 1-inch thick rounds.
In a small bowl, whisk together coconut oil, allspice, cinnamon, nutmeg, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper until a paste forms.
Brush each potato round evenly with the spice paste, ensuring all sides are coated.
Place the coated rounds on the preheated grill, close the lid, and cook for 6 minutes on each side until a golden crust forms and the inside is tender.
While grilling, mix vinegar, lime juice, and a splash of water to create a tangy glaze.
Once the potatoes are grilled, brush the glaze over each round, letting it caramelize slightly for 30 seconds.
Remove the potatoes from the grill, transfer to a serving platter, and drizzle with a little more glaze.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, serve hot.
